q: Did you like your school when you were a child?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về cảm xúc trong quá khứ. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể nói 'có' hoặc 'không' (hoặc cả hai tùy giai đoạn). Đề cập đến bạn bè, thầy cô, các hoạt động vui chơi hay cơ sở vật chất. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'fond memories', 'cherished moments', 'a sense of belonging', 'playground', 'extracurricular activities', 'nurturing environment'.

band7.text: Yes, I really liked my school when I was a child. I had a lot of friends, and we always played together during the breaks. The teachers were also very kind and they made the lessons easy to understand, which I appreciated a lot.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, ngôn ngữ tự nhiên, sử dụng thì quá khứ tốt. Lý do nêu ra rõ ràng.

band8.text: I have very fond memories of my primary school years. It was a very nurturing environment where creativity was encouraged. What I loved most were the extracurricular activities, like the choir and the drama club, which gave me a real sense of belonging.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao ('fond memories', 'nurturing environment', 'sense of belonging'). Cấu trúc câu linh hoạt.

band9.text: Looking back, I absolutely adored my school. It wasn't just a place of academic learning, but a community that fostered personal growth. I cherished the moments spent on the playground with my peers, and I truly felt that the school provided a solid foundation for my future development.
band9.note: Diễn đạt cực kỳ tinh tế ('adored', 'fostered personal growth', 'cherished', 'peers', 'solid foundation'). Cách dùng 'Looking back' rất tự nhiên trong văn nói.

v.example: I have fond memories of our family holidays by the sea.
I will always cherish the time we spent together.
A nurturing environment is essential for a child's healthy development.
Joining a club can give people a much-needed sense of belonging.
The school offers a wide range of extracurricular activities, from sports to music.
The children were playing happily on the school playground.
The university focuses on both academic learning and practical research.
The program is designed to foster innovation and creativity.
Traveling alone can be a great opportunity for personal growth.
A good education provides a solid foundation for any career.
It's important for children to learn how to interact with their peers.
I absolutely adore my young nieces and nephews.
I really appreciate all the help you've given me.
I had a very happy and carefree childhood.
My primary school was just a short walk from our house.
The local community came together to support the family.

v.meaning: sự phát triển trong tương lai
v.example: The company is investing heavily in the future development of its products.
My parents have always been very supportive of my choices.
The teacher gave an inspiring talk about her experiences abroad.
Our wedding day was the most memorable day of my life.
She has a very creative mind and is always coming up with new ideas.
Uni is a great place to meet new people and socialize.
Good teamwork is essential for the success of any project.
We've maintained a strong friendship for over twenty years.
We used to play football on the field during recess.
The new school curriculum focuses more on practical skills.
The trip to the science museum was very educational.
The documentary was very enlightening and changed my perspective.
There was a very relaxed and friendly atmosphere at the café.
The university has excellent sports and gym facilities.
The new science lab is very well-equipped with the latest technology.
The office has a very modern and stylish design.
The village is known for its beautiful traditional architecture.
The city has a very diverse population from all over the world.
The school aims to provide an inclusive environment for all students.
The university offers a peer mentoring program for freshmen.
I'm looking for some guidance on which career path to choose.
This job is a great opportunity to gain international experience.
Learning to play the violin is a major challenge.
The Nobel Prize is the highest achievement in many fields.
The whole city joined in the celebration of the national team's victory.
It's a family tradition to have a big dinner on Christmas Eve.
The old school building is a beautiful architectural legacy.
My parents have had a huge influence on my life values.
Many young athletes see her as a great role model.
The academy helps to nurture young musical talent.
The tax cuts are intended to stimulate the economy.
She was a woman of great intellect and passion.
He has a very successful academic career in history.
The new teaching method is based on sound pedagogical principles.
